## Content Rule

- [ ] This PR only uses facts present in the linked issue or cited sources.
- [ ] Missing details remain unknown, not provided, or pending.
- [ ] No names, dates, locations, relationships, quotes, consent, approvals, or source status were inferred.

## Source And Claim Review

- [ ] Every factual claim has at least one `source_id`.
- [ ] Pending or unconfirmed claims include qualification language.
- [ ] Sensitive or do-not-publish notes from the linked issue were handled.
- [ ] No third-party images are published without approval.

## Approval Gates

- [ ] Family consent received in writing
- [ ] All facts traced to at least one source
- [ ] No images of third parties
- [ ] Spanish translation drafted
- [ ] Family review of final draft
- [ ] Second editor sign-off
